title: selaginella fragillima
intro: Selaginella fragillima, also known as brittle club moss or fragile spikemoss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family that grows in tropical and subtropical regions, characterized by its small, delicate fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may help to treat various health issues such as skin infections and respiratory problems. Consuming the plant in herbal preparations may provide health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
